name: P2 W3 Qwen3.5 survival, native-delta, and propagation shards
purpose: Continue P2 from item 030 by using multiple GPUs to run the remaining W3.1/W3.2 measurements: prompt-hidden survival curves, native hidden push/pop delta gap, and a small M2 task-suite propagation delta against the stored Qwen3-4B baseline. This item measures the missing probes but does not accept Qwen3.5 as an in-state stack or complete a large-scale propagation proof.

code_added_used.change: Added run-survival, run-native-delta, run-propagation, propagation task-type sharding, and shard merge support.
Added reproducible multi-GPU launcher: hidden probes on GPU 0 and propagation shards over GPUs 1-5.
Documented measured continuation command and limitation that survival is prompt-hidden, not cached recurrent state.
Added W3 measured-probe validation and item 031 contract checks.
Added item 031 to artifact index for item-first ledger embedding.

commands.command: CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 ~/.local/bin/uv run --python .venv/bin/python python -m experiments.w3_qwen35_probe --output-dir results/w3_qwen35_probe --load-model --device cuda:0 --run-survival --run-native-delta > /tmp/w3_hidden.out
commands.purpose: Measured hidden hook, prompt-hidden survival, and native delta gap on Qwen/Qwen3.5-4B.

commands.command: CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 ~/.local/bin/uv run --python .venv/bin/python python -m experiments.w3_qwen35_probe --output-dir results/w3_qwen35_probe/propagation_shards/horn_sat --device cuda:0 --run-propagation --propagation-task-types horn_sat --propagation-n-instances 3 --propagation-max-nodes-per-task 2 --propagation-seeds 42 --propagation-cap-nodes 32 --propagation-batch-size 2 > /tmp/w3_horn_sat.out
commands.purpose: Measured W3.2 propagation shard for horn_sat.

commands.command: CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=2 ~/.local/bin/uv run --python .venv/bin/python python -m experiments.w3_qwen35_probe --output-dir results/w3_qwen35_probe/propagation_shards/general_sat --device cuda:0 --run-propagation --propagation-task-types general_sat --propagation-n-instances 3 --propagation-max-nodes-per-task 2 --propagation-seeds 42 --propagation-cap-nodes 32 --propagation-batch-size 2 > /tmp/w3_general_sat.out
commands.purpose: Measured W3.2 propagation shard for general_sat.

commands.command: CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=3 ~/.local/bin/uv run --python .venv/bin/python python -m experiments.w3_qwen35_probe --output-dir results/w3_qwen35_probe/propagation_shards/graph_coloring --device cuda:0 --run-propagation --propagation-task-types graph_coloring --propagation-n-instances 3 --propagation-max-nodes-per-task 2 --propagation-seeds 42 --propagation-cap-nodes 32 --propagation-batch-size 2 > /tmp/w3_graph_coloring.out
commands.purpose: Measured W3.2 propagation shard for graph_coloring.

commands.command: CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=4 ~/.local/bin/uv run --python .venv/bin/python python -m experiments.w3_qwen35_probe --output-dir results/w3_qwen35_probe/propagation_shards/sudoku_4x4 --device cuda:0 --run-propagation --propagation-task-types sudoku_4x4 --propagation-n-instances 3 --propagation-max-nodes-per-task 2 --propagation-seeds 42 --propagation-cap-nodes 32 --propagation-batch-size 2 > /tmp/w3_sudoku_4x4.out
commands.purpose: Measured W3.2 propagation shard for sudoku_4x4.

commands.command: CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=5 ~/.local/bin/uv run --python .venv/bin/python python -m experiments.w3_qwen35_probe --output-dir results/w3_qwen35_probe/propagation_shards/logic_grid --device cuda:0 --run-propagation --propagation-task-types logic_grid --propagation-n-instances 3 --propagation-max-nodes-per-task 2 --propagation-seeds 42 --propagation-cap-nodes 32 --propagation-batch-size 2 > /tmp/w3_logic_grid.out
commands.purpose: Measured W3.2 propagation shard for logic_grid.
Merged propagation shards into canonical W3 result.

rows.number: half_life=1 at depths 1,2,4 under prompt-hidden cosine
rows.routing: do not use as cached state proof

rows.number: restore_error=0.864..1.039; inverse_cosine falls to 0.302 at depth 3
rows.routing: do not target native in-state stack integration
continue as alongside-only candidate; no P2 accept

honesty.does_not_establish: This item does not establish stable cached recurrent stack memory in Qwen3.5, does not establish native hidden deltas as keyed register push/pop, does not show propagation improvement sufficient for acceptance, and does not complete a large-scale P2 proof.
limitations: Survival uses last-token prompt-hidden cosine and repeated textual current-node passes, not a true kv_snapshot or recurrent hidden-state carry intervention.
Propagation is a small shard run with n_instances=3 and max_nodes_per_task=2 per task family.
Per-task propagation verdicts remain NEEDS_OPERATOR_FIX across all five task families.

decision.next_step_routing: Treat Qwen3.5 as alongside-only measured evidence, not in-state integration. If P2 continues, scale propagation or design a true cached-state intervention; do not integrate Qwen3.5 into the structured state path from this item.
